item.title: Mid-Tier BIM Tools: The $1.2B Gap in MEP CAD Markets
40% Compliance Savings: EU AI Rules Force Ethical Audits in 2026
Running Local AI on Apple Silicon in 2026: The Ollama MLX Revolution
item.description: Ollama's new MLX backend for Apple Silicon is a game-changer. Here's what it means for your local AI workflow and how to build an autonomous research pipeline with zero cloud costs.
